name: Personal Service
description: A PERSONAL SERVICE is a prominent service provider in Brazil that offers specialized services for both commercial and residential sectors, integrating Human Resources with processes and technology. With over 21 years of experience and a strong workforce, the company is well-equipped to deliver high-quality facilities and technical services.

name: Homeserve
description: HomeServe is a prominent home assistance provider in the UK, offering a variety of services such as plumbing, electrical, and heating solutions through a network of approved engineers. With over 25 years of experience, the company emphasizes customer satisfaction and provides emergency repairs and maintenance options.

name: My Services
description: My Services specializes in comprehensive cleaning solutions for both residential and commercial spaces, offering a range of services including building and facility cleaning, special floor cleaning, and upholstery cleaning. Their commitment to high-quality service and operational efficiency ensures that they meet the diverse needs of their clients effectively throughout the year.

name: Housecall Pro
description: Housecall Pro is a specialized software provider that offers comprehensive business solutions for home service professionals in industries like HVAC, plumbing, electrical, and cleaning. Their platform enhances operational efficiency through features such as job scheduling, technician dispatch, invoicing, and customer relationship management, making it an ideal tool for home services businesses looking to simplify their operations and increase profitability.

name: Home Helpers
description: Home Helpers® Home Care specializes in providing in-home care services, particularly for seniors and individuals requiring ongoing support. Their offerings include homemaker services that ensure a safe and clean living environment, allowing clients to maintain independence and enhance their quality of life.

name: CLR Facility Services Pvt. Ltd.
description: CLR Facility Services Private Limited offers a comprehensive range of soft services, including housekeeping, guest house management, and landscaping, tailored to meet specific business needs. Their commitment to quality and operational stability ensures that workplaces are well-maintained and conducive to productivity.

name: International Health Solutions Inc.
description: The company, International Health Solutions, Inc., specializes in home-based health care services, offering a comprehensive range of personalized options such as skilled nursing, physical therapy, and personal care. Their multilingual and multicultural team ensures that patients receive quality care in the comfort of their own homes.

name: Seniors Home Services
description: Senior Home Services specializes in providing comprehensive solutions for seniors aging at home, offering a wide range of products and services such as chair lifts, medical alert systems, and home modifications. Their use of AI technology for activity alerts and telemonitoring ensures safety and effective management of health needs.

name: Home Alliance
description: Home Alliance specializes in a wide range of home services, connecting homeowners with licensed technicians for tasks such as air conditioning and heating, appliance repair, plumbing, and electrical services. Their commitment to customer satisfaction is evident through their fast, reliable service and warranty on repairs.

name: HomeWell Care Services
description: HomeWell specializes in home care solutions, offering a variety of services such as companion care and transitional care, all tailored to individual needs. Their commitment to personalized care and community relationships ensures comprehensive support for clients and families.
